assertions.reason: Targeted Jest coverage confirmed initializeFirstLaunch is callable with zero args, injects a BiometricVault into EnboxUserAgent.create, calls agent.initialize({}) without any password field, returns the recovery phrase, and stores that phrase on useAgentStore.

src/lib/enbox/__tests__/agent-store.test.ts :: wires the BiometricVault into EnboxUserAgent.create as agentVault

src/lib/enbox/agent-init.ts:68-97 creates the BiometricVault and passes it to EnboxUserAgent.create as agentVault.

assertions.reason: Targeted Jest coverage confirmed unlockAgent takes zero args, calls agent.start({}) without a password field, leaves a live agent in store state, and does not repopulate recoveryPhrase.

codeInspection: src/lib/enbox/agent-store.ts:181-220 unlocks via agent.start({}) and never writes recoveryPhrase during unlock.

assertions.reason: Focused wiring tests and static source checks confirmed initializeAgent constructs a BiometricVault, passes it as agentVault, and neither agent-init.ts nor agent-store.ts references HdIdentityVault.

src/lib/enbox/agent-init.ts:95 passes agentVault: vault into EnboxUserAgent.create.

assertions.reason: Targeted Jest coverage confirmed biometrics-unavailable errors preserve code VAULT_ERROR_BIOMETRICS_UNAVAILABLE, populate a non-empty store error, reset isInitializing to false, and leave agent/vault null.

tests: src/lib/enbox/__tests__/agent-store.test.ts :: propagates VAULT_ERROR_BIOMETRICS_UNAVAILABLE with .code intact
codeInspection: src/lib/enbox/agent-store.ts:160-179 maps biometrics-unavailable failures into store error state, clears initialization flags, and rethrows the original error.

assertions.reason: Targeted Jest coverage confirmed the recovery phrase is surfaced once after initializeFirstLaunch, cleared by clearRecoveryPhrase/teardown, stays null on unlock, and never appears in mocked SecureStorage writes or zustand persistence middleware.

tests: src/lib/enbox/__tests__/agent-store.recoveryPhrase.test.ts :: initializeFirstLaunch() populates `recoveryPhrase` with the vault mnemonic
src/lib/enbox/__tests__/agent-store.recoveryPhrase.test.ts :: clearRecoveryPhrase() nulls the stored phrase
src/lib/enbox/__tests__/agent-store.recoveryPhrase.test.ts :: teardown() nulls the stored phrase even if the UI never called clearRecoveryPhrase()

src/lib/enbox/__tests__/agent-store.recoveryPhrase.test.ts :: NEVER writes the mnemonic to SecureStorage during first-launch
src/lib/enbox/__tests__/agent-store.recoveryPhrase.test.ts :: zustand agent store exposes NO persistence middleware (regression guard)
codeInspection: src/lib/enbox/agent-store.ts:267-287 exposes clearRecoveryPhrase() and teardown(), both of which null recoveryPhrase.

assertions.reason: Focused Jest coverage confirmed initializeAgent still applies the AgentDwnApi mobile monkey patch before agent creation, skips LocalDwnDiscovery when localDwnStrategy is off, remains idempotent across repeated initializeAgent calls, and the existing RNLevel lazy-open/notFound regression tests still pass.
